channel.title: Linguistics Vanguard
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Linguistics Vanguard

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Alice Idone, Lisa Gasner, Giulia Donzelli, Adriano Salvi, Michele Loporcaro DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lingvan-2024-frontmatters5

item.title: Getting “good” data in a pandemic, part 2: more tools in the toolbox
item.description: Article by Alice Idone, Lisa Gasner, Giulia Donzelli, Adriano Salvi, Michele Loporcaro DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lingvan-2024-0202

item.title: Reading Twitter as a marketplace of ideas: how attitudes to COVID-19 are affecting attitudes to migrants in Ireland
item.description: Article by Alice Idone, Lisa Gasner, Giulia Donzelli, Adriano Salvi, Michele Loporcaro DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lingvan-2021-0158

item.title: Collecting language assessment data in the age of pandemic: a preliminary case study of Chinese EFL learners
item.description: Article by Alice Idone, Lisa Gasner, Giulia Donzelli, Adriano Salvi, Michele Loporcaro DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lingvan-2021-0148

item.title: Investigating the relationship between the speed of automatization and linguistic abilities: data collection during the COVID-19 pandemic
item.description: Article by Alice Idone, Lisa Gasner, Giulia Donzelli, Adriano Salvi, Michele Loporcaro DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lingvan-2021-0145

item.title: Gettin’ sociolinguistic data remotely: comparing vernacularity during online remote versus in-person sociolinguistic interviews
item.description: Article by Alice Idone, Lisa Gasner, Giulia Donzelli, Adriano Salvi, Michele Loporcaro DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lingvan-2022-0069

item.title: Bear in a Window: collecting Australian children’s stories of the COVID-19 pandemic
item.description: Article by Alice Idone, Lisa Gasner, Giulia Donzelli, Adriano Salvi, Michele Loporcaro DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lingvan-2021-0150

item.title: Re-taking the field: resuming in-person fieldwork amid the COVID-19 pandemic
item.description: Article by Alice Idone, Lisa Gasner, Giulia Donzelli, Adriano Salvi, Michele Loporcaro DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lingvan-2021-0155
